title: AI Adoption Gap: Businesses Are SLOWLY Catching Up! #shorts
summary: Advanced AI capabilities are developing faster than businesses can adopt them, with agentic AI seeing particularly slow enterprise uptake. This adoption gap represents missed opportunities for companies seeking transformative growth.
